hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ] && exit 0; git add -A && git commit -q -m "chore: auto-commit at session end" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>"; git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1 && git push -q 2>/dev/null || true
